name: Darcmon

signature_move.name: La Pucelle
signature_move.description: A magnificent sword technique using its slender sword,La Pucelle.

description: A low-ranking Angel Digimon which has the appearance of a woman. It is in the advance forces of Angel Digimon, and its figure which always cuts through the vanguard to battle is said to almost be a " Goddess of the Battlefield ". Its Special Move is a magnificent sword technique using its slender blade " La Pucelle " ( Baptême d'Amour ).
